creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Alex S from comment #18)

Of course. ;-)
But if such softwares are in ports tree, they should explicitly depend on x11/linux-nvidia-libs* like how net-im/zoom does.

Without it, how can we (and pkg database) know that it (implicitly) depending on x11/linux-nvidia-libs*?
